---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include any console or terminal output.

## Environment

- OS:
- Node version:
- Browser:
- Report engine (`REPORT_ENGINE`): deterministic / openai / ollama

## Data / citation impact

If a generated report showed a wrong or uncited number, note the report type and
the specific metric — this is the most important kind of bug for this project.

## Additional context

Screenshots or anything else.
